title: The Cube SMP: A Kay SMP Spinoff
description: A magic, tech, and adventure-focused modpack built for long-term multiplayer. Explore massive dungeons, cast powerful spells, master automation, or become a superhero. Your world, your path, your story.
body:
## **🧊 The Cube SMP: A Kay SMP Spinoff**

Created by **Cube527** and **KayMa3**, this modpack is designed to support long-term multiplayer survival, packed with exploration, danger, magic, and high-tech innovation. Built for servers, friends, and creators who want an adventure that keeps evolving over time.

Start your journey in a wild, handcrafted world filled with dungeons, ancient magic, lost technologies, and monsters that won’t go easy on you. Whether you build your empire on land, in the skies, or deep underground, **The Cube SMP** gives you the tools — and challenges — to forge your story.

---

### 🏹 Exploration & Adventure

* **When Dungeons Arise**, **Cataclysm**, **YUNG’s Better Structures** – World-gen overhauls and massive dungeons
* **Blue Skies**, **The Aether**, **End Remastered**, **Enderman Overhaul** – New dimensions and endgame challenges
* **Alex’s Mobs**, **Alex’s Caves**, **Creeper Overhaul** – Unique encounters and dynamic biomes
* **Waystones**, **Bountiful**, **Towns & Towers** – Travel and questing made meaningful

---

### 🧪 Technology & Automation

* **Create**, **Create: Steam ‘n Rails**, **Thermal Series**, **Immersive Engineering** – Powerful automation and factory building
* **Applied Energistics 2**, **Polymorphic Energistics**, **Tinkers’ Construct** – Storage, tools, and crafting customization
* **Project Red (Full Suite)**, **Railcraft Reborn**, **EnderIO** – Advanced redstone, logic, and transport
* **AE2**, **FerriteCore**, **ModernFix**, **Spark** – Performance tuned for multiplayer

---

### 🧙 Magic & Combat

* **Irons Spells ‘n Spellbooks** – RPG-style spellcasting and class builds
* **Tinkers’ Construct**, **MCDW**, **Better Combat** – Weapons, reworked combat, and custom gear
* **End Remastered**, **Bosses of Mass Destruction**, **Ensorcellation** – Bosses, enchantments, and challenges
* **Friends & Foes**, **Zombie Awareness**, **Fish of Thieves** – Unexpected twists and smart enemies

---

### 🌍 Immersion & Worldbuilding

* **Terralith**, **Tectonic**, **Dynamic Trees**, **Immersive Weathering** – A living, evolving landscape
* **Sound Physics Remastered**, **Physics Mod**, **First Person Model**, **3D Skin Layers** – Deep visual and audio immersion
* **Simple Voice Chat**, **Xaero’s Minimap**, **Jade**, **Sophisticated Backpacks** – Multiplayer QOL
* **Visual Workbench**, **Carry On**, **Lootr** – Polished survival mechanics

---

Whether you rise as a magical overlord, become a factory tycoon, or explore every forgotten temple…
**This is your story. Your survival. Your legacy.**

Welcome to **The Cube SMP**.
